block_00: First ECB conference in 2019. Will Mario Draghi’s speech shift sentiment?
block_01: Investor eyes are focusing for ECB’s first conference for 2019 that will follow the key interest rate decision. ECB’s conference tone will be in the spotlight as the Eurozone economy weakened towards the end of 2018.
block_02: While the key interest rate decision remains very important for investors, the ECB conference has overshadowed it more recently in terms of volatility and impact.
block_03: Investors will focus on the wording during the speech of ECB president Mario Draghi. Strong or hawkish words are considered positive for the european currency, whereas softer or dovish words are considered negative.
